text.message: i was praying for a 4 all game 😭😭

black looking dangerous with the road

tears are going to start rolling soon..

orange trade sheep for a wheat for me
I'm confused what you were asking
just adds more fuel to the tears fire
black the audacity to ask for wheat after blocking it the entire game..
u at least have ur other 8
took the one thing I needed too
why did u take my sheep port if u dont even have sheep
I often do, but you stole all my sheep with the monopoly
that's all I needed at the time lol
what do you need to take that 11, 9 spot?
